core_mechanism: perturbative renormalization-group (coarse-graining) flow of a weak random perturbation added to a critical fixed point, tracking whether the perturbation is relevant or marginal to determine either a mere amplitude crossover or a shift in the scaling exponents
brief_reason: The abstract computes crossover behavior of the correlation function by a renormalisation approach to the perturbation series around the pure critical (conformal) theories, finding that added randomness leaves the exponent unchanged in one case but shifts it in the other — i.e. an RG flow deciding the relevance of a weak perturbation about a fixed point.
